note: HUD glyph atlas, generated by tools/fonts/gen_hud_font.py (decisions.md D41/D46). A fixed-cell monospace atlas of printable ASCII (0x20..0x7E); render::text uploads hud_atlas.gray as an R8 texture and samples one cell per glyph. The FONT_* metrics in render::text MUST match the grid fields below. Render-only; regenerate with `pnpm assets:font`.
author: Red Hat / Liberation fonts project (rendered via ImageMagick)
